routing-pages.name: pages/index.tsx
routing-pages.example:
// pages/index.tsx export default function Home() { return

Home

}

routing-pages.name: pages/about.tsx
routing-pages.desc: Halaman statis dengan nama file sebagai rute.
routing-pages.example:
// pages/about.tsx export default function About() { return

About

}

routing-pages.name: pages/[slug].tsx
routing-pages.example:
// pages/posts/[id].tsx export default function Post({ id }) { return

Post {id}

}

routing-pages.name: pages/[...slug].tsx
routing-pages.example:
// pages/docs/[...params].tsx export default function Docs({ params }) { return

{params.join('/')}

}

routing-pages.name: pages/api/hello.ts
routing-pages.example:
// pages/api/hello.ts
export default function handler(req, res) { res.status(200).json({ name: 'John' }) }

data-fetching.name: getServerSideProps
data-fetching.example: export async function getServerSideProps() { const data = await fetch(...); return { props: { data } } }

data-fetching.name: getStaticProps
data-fetching.example: export async function getStaticProps() { const data = await fetch(...); return { props: { data }, revalidate: 60 } }

data-fetching.name: getStaticPaths
data-fetching.desc: Tentukan path dinamis yang akan di-generate static.
data-fetching.example: export async function getStaticPaths() { const posts = await fetch(...); const paths = posts.map(p => ({ params: { id: p.id } })); return { paths, fallback: false } }

data-fetching.name: getInitialProps
data-fetching.desc: Cara lama (bisa digunakan di _app). Masih ada tapi tidak disarankan.

rendering.name: Server-Side Rendering (SSR)
rendering.desc: Halaman dirender di server per request menggunakan getServerSideProps.

rendering.name: Static Site Generation (SSG)
rendering.desc: Halaman di-generate saat build dengan getStaticProps.

rendering.name: Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR)
rendering.desc: Perbarui halaman statis di background setelah build.

rendering.name: Client-Side Rendering (CSR)
rendering.desc: Fetch data dari client menggunakan useEffect atau SWR.

components.name: next/image
components.desc: Komponen gambar yang dioptimasi (wajib properti width/height).
components.example:
import Image from 'next/image';
<Image src="/hero.jpg" width={800} height={600} alt="Hero" />

components.name: next/script
components.desc: Memuat script eksternal dengan strategi tertentu.

router.name: useRouter
router.desc: Hook untuk mengakses router (push, replace, query, dll).

router.name: withRouter
router.desc: HOC untuk menyuntikkan router ke komponen (class component).

api-routes.name: req.method
api-routes.desc: Cek HTTP method di API route.

api-routes.name: res.status(code).json(data)
api-routes.desc: Kirim respons JSON dengan status code.

configuration.name: Custom App (`_app.tsx`)
configuration.example:
// pages/_app.tsx
export default function MyApp({ Component, pageProps }) { return <Layout><Component {...pageProps} /></Layout> }

configuration.name: Custom Document (`_document.tsx`)
configuration.desc: Kustomisasi struktur HTML (misal menambah lang, font).
configuration.example:
// pages/_document.tsx
export default function Document() { return <Html lang="id">...</Html> }

middleware.name: Middleware (Pages Router)
middleware.desc: File `_middleware.ts` di dalam folder pages untuk menjalankan logika sebelum request.
middleware.example:
// pages/_middleware.ts
export function middleware(req) { return NextResponse.next() }

error-handling.name: pages/404.tsx
error-handling.example:
// pages/404.tsx export default function NotFound() { return

404 - Not Found

}

error-handling.name: pages/_error.tsx
error-handling.desc: Halaman error kustom untuk server/client error.
error-handling.example:
// pages/_error.tsx export default function Error({ statusCode }) { return

{statusCode} error

}

error-handling.name: getStaticProps fallback
error-handling.desc: fallback: true atau 'blocking' untuk halaman yang belum di-generate.
